title: Add user lookup and rule evaluation helpers
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+import sqlite3
+
+
+def get_user(conn, user_id):
+    cursor = conn.cursor()
+    query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '" + user_id + "'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return cursor.fetchone()
+
+
+def run_rule(expr, context):
+    return eval(expr, {}, context)

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+import sqlite3
+
+
+def get_user(conn, user_id):
+    cursor = conn.cursor()
+    query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '" + user_id + "'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return cursor.fetchone()
+
+
+def run_rule(expr, context):
+    return eval(expr, {}, context)

expected_findings.title: SQL injection via string-concatenated query
expected_findings.rationale: user_id is concatenated directly into the SQL string and executed, allowing SQL injection. A parameterized query must be used instead.

expected_findings.title: Arbitrary code execution via eval()
expected_findings.rationale: eval() executes attacker-controllable expression text, enabling remote code execution. eval must be avoided for untrusted input.
